task_completion.description: Configure video transcoding settings for H.264 and 720x480 resolution
task_completion.visual_evidence: A media transcoding GUI (like VLC or Handbrake) or a terminal command (e.g., ffmpeg) showing video settings explicitly configured to use the H.264 codec and a resolution of 720x480.

task_completion.description: Configure audio transcoding settings for Mono AAC at 44.1 kHz
task_completion.visual_evidence: A media transcoding GUI or terminal command showing audio settings configured to use the AAC codec, 1 channel (Mono), and a sample rate of 44.1 kHz (44100 Hz).

task_completion.description: Configure subtitles to be burned into the video stream
task_completion.visual_evidence: A media transcoding GUI or terminal command showing the subtitle file `/home/ga/Documents/compliance_overlay.srt` selected and configured to be burned or overlaid directly into the video output.

task_completion.description: Save the transcoded videos to the IFE_Ready directory in MPEG-TS format
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal listing the newly created files `promo_destinations.ts`, `promo_rewards.ts`, and `promo_safety.ts` in the `/home/ga/Videos/IFE_Ready/` directory.

task_completion.description: Create the JSON manifest with batch details and processed files
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of `/home/ga/Documents/ife_manifest.json` containing the `batch_id` 'IFE-PROMO-001', `target_system` 'Legacy Seatback V2', and a `processed_files` list detailing the original files, output files, and audio channels.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine transcoding tool to process the videos.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with a real media converter (GUI like VLC/Handbrake or CLI like ffmpeg) rather than just renaming file extensions.

integrity.description: The output files were genuinely generated and not faked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output .ts files should be the result of a transcoding process, not created by using `touch` or simply copying the source files without conversion.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the JSON manifest manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or constructing the JSON manifest in a text editor or via terminal commands, rather than copying a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output files are promo_destinations.ts, promo_rewards.ts, and promo_safety.ts in an MPEG-TS container. Target resolution is 720x480. Target audio is 1 channel (Mono) at 44100 Hz using the AAC codec. Target video uses the H.264 codec. Subtitles from compliance_overlay.srt must be burned into the video.
